heading: Repealed. ,Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1028
label: 111 to 113 Repealed. ,Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1028
notes: Section 111, , , related to homestead entry of lands in Utah.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 367, § 137 Stat. 496
Section 112, , , related to required information in the application for entry.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 367, § 237 Stat. 496
Section 113, , , related to reservation of oil and gas to the United States in the lands entered.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 367, § 337 Stat. 496
Provisions on entry of lands withdrawn or classified as oil lands are contained in sections 121 to 123 of this title.
